mapper.select: SELECT t1.*, sum(t2.weight::integer) as weight FROM esg.tb_contractor_sh_checklist t1 LEFT JOIN esg.tb_contractor_sh_checklist_detail t2 ON t1.comp_id = t2.comp_id AND t1.eval_type_id = t2.eval_type_id AND t1.use_yn = 'Y' AND t2.use_yn = 'Y' WHERE t1.comp_id = #{compId} group by t1.comp_id, t1.eval_type_id order by t1.use_yn DESC, t1.ord_seq ASC
SELECT tdt.* FROM dataset.tb_dataset_contractor_sh_checklist tdt WHERE tdt.use_yn = 'Y' order by tdt.use_yn DESC, tdt.ord_seq ASC
SELECT tdt.* FROM dataset.tb_dataset_contractor_sh_checklist_detail tdt WHERE tdt.eval_type_id = #{evalTypeId} AND use_yn = 'Y' order by tdt.use_yn DESC, tdt.ord_seq ASC
mapper.insert:
select case when #{evalTypeId} is null or #{evalTypeId} = '' then to_char(now(), 'yyyymmdd') || lpad((coalesce(max(substring(eval_type_id from 9 for 4))::int, 0) + 1)::text, 4, '0') else #{evalTypeId}::varchar end as evalTypeId from esg.tb_contractor_sh_checklist where eval_type_id like to_char(now(), 'YYYYMMDD') || '%' and comp_id = #{compId}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_contractor_sh_checklist ( eval_type_id, comp_id, eval_type_nm, use_yn, ord_seq, created_at, created_by ) VALUES( #{evalTypeId}, #{compId}, #{evalTypeNm}, #{useYn}, #{ordSeq}, now(), #{createdBy} )

select case when #{evalDetailId} is null or #{evalDetailId} = '' then to_char(now(), 'yyyymmdd') || lpad((coalesce(max(substring(eval_detail_id from 9 for 4))::int, 0) + 1)::text, 4, '0') else #{evalDetailId}::varchar end as evalDetailId from esg.tb_contractor_sh_checklist_detail where eval_detail_id like to_char(now(), 'YYYYMMDD') || '%' and comp_id = #{compId} and eval_detail_id = #{evalDetailId}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_contractor_sh_checklist_detail ( eval_type_id, eval_detail_id, eval_detail_nm, weight, use_yn, ord_seq, div_a, div_b, div_c, div_d, div_e, created_at, created_by, comp_id ) VALUES( #{evalTypeId}, #{evalDetailId}, #{evalDetailNm}, #{weight}, #{useYn}, #{ordSeq}, #{divA}, #{divB}, #{divC}, #{divD}, #{divE}, now(), #{createdBy}, #{compId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE esg.tb_contractor_sh_checklist_detail SET eval_detail_nm = #{evalDetailNm}, weight=#{weight}, use_yn = #{useYn}, ord_seq = #{ordSeq}, div_a=#{divA}, div_b=#{divB}, div_c=#{divC}, div_d=#{divD}, div_e=#{divE}, updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE eval_type_id = #{evalTypeId} AND eval_detail_id = #{evalDetailId} AND comp_id = #{compId}
mapper.insert:
SELECT LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(doc_no)::INTEGER, 0) + 1)::TEXT, 5, '0') AS doc_no FROM esg.tb_contractor_assmt_report WHERE write_year = #{writeYear}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_contractor_assmt_report ( write_year, doc_type, doc_no, comp_id, part_comp_id, assmt_dt, assmt_manager_hr_id, assmt_content, point, remark, superior_content, insufficient_content, use_yn, created_at, created_by ) VALUES( #{writeYear}, #{docType}, #{docNo}, #{compId}, #{partCompId}, #{assmtDt}, #{assmtManagerHrId}, #{assmtContent}, #{point}, #{remark}, #{superiorContent}, #{insufficientContent}, #{useYn}, now(), #{createdBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE esg.tb_contractor_assmt_report SET part_comp_id=#{partCompId}, assmt_dt=#{assmtDt}, assmt_manager_hr_id=#{assmtManagerHrId}, assmt_content=#{assmtContent}, point=#{point}, remark=#{remark}, superior_content=#{superiorContent}, insufficient_content=#{insufficientContent}, use_yn=#{useYn}, updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} and doc_type = #{docType} and doc_no = #{docNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO esg.tb_contractor_assmt_report_hr ( write_year, doc_type, doc_no, hr_id, hr_nm, created_at, created_by ) VALUES( #{writeYear}, #{docType}, #{docNo}, #{hrId}, #{hrNm}, now(), #{createdBy} )

INSERT INTO esg.tb_contractor_assmt_report_master ( write_year, doc_type, doc_no, eval_type_id, eval_type_nm, use_yn, ord_seq, created_at, created_by ) VALUES( #{writeYear}, #{docType}, #{docNo}, #{evalTypeId}, #{evalTypeNm}, #{useYn}, #{ordSeq}, now(), #{createdBy} )

INSERT INTO esg.tb_contractor_assmt_report_detail ( eval_type_id, eval_detail_id, eval_detail_nm, write_year, doc_type, doc_no, weight, use_yn, ord_seq, div_a, div_b, div_c, div_d, div_e, point, created_at, created_by ) VALUES( #{evalTypeId}, #{evalDetailId}, #{evalDetailNm}, #{writeYear}, #{docType}, #{docNo}, #{weight}, #{useYn}, #{ordSeq}, #{divA}, #{divB}, #{divC}, #{divD}, #{divE}, #{point}, now(), #{createdBy} )
mapper.select: with a as ( SELECT car.write_year, car.doc_type, car.doc_no, car.assmt_dt, car.assmt_manager_hr_id, car.assmt_content, car.point, car.remark, car.superior_content, car.insufficient_content, car.created_at, car.created_by, car.updated_at, car.updated_by, tpci.part_comp_id, thi.hr_nm AS assmt_manager_hr_nm, car.use_yn as assmt_use_yn, tpci.use_yn, tpci.part_comp_nm || CASE WHEN tpci.use_yn = 'N' THEN ' - (미사용)' ELSE '' END AS part_comp_nm, RANK() OVER ( PARTITION BY tpci.part_comp_id ORDER BY car.use_yn desc, car.assmt_dt desc NULLS LAST ) AS rnk FROM esg.tb_contractor_assmt_report car FULL OUTER JOIN esg.tb_partner_comp_info tpci ON car.part_comp_id = tpci.part_comp_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_info thi ON car.assmt_manager_hr_id = thi.hr_id WHERE tpci.comp_id = #{compId} AND tpci.reg_dt <= #{writeYear} || '1231' and (('N' = #{useYn}) OR ( 'Y' = #{useYn} AND tpci.use_yn = #{useYn})) ) select a.* , case when b.hr_id is not null and b.signature is not null and c.hr_id is null and c.signature is null then 'I' when b.hr_id is not null and b.signature is not null and c.hr_id is not null and c.signature is null then 'I' when b.hr_id is not null and b.signature is not null and c.hr_id is not null and c.signature is not null then 'Y' when b.hr_id is not null and b.signature is null and c.hr_id is null and c.signature is null then 'C' when b.hr_id is not null and b.signature is null and c.hr_id is not null and c.signature is not null then 'I' when b.hr_id is null and b.signature is null and c.hr_id is not null and c.signature is null then 'C' when b.hr_id is null and b.signature is null and c.hr_id is not null and c.signature is not null then 'Y' when b.hr_id is null and b.signature is null and c.hr_id is null and c.signature is null then 'C' end as approvalStatus from a left join esg.tb_approval_info b on b.target_type = 'CSHAR' and b.target_id = a.write_year || a.doc_no and b.param = 'writer' left join esg.tb_approval_info c on c.target_type = 'CSHAR' and c.target_id = a.write_year || a.doc_no and c.param = 'reviewer' where rnk = 1 order by a.doc_no IS NULL, a.assmt_use_yn DESC, a.use_yn DESC, a.created_at desc

SELECT car.*,tpci.part_comp_nm, thi.hr_nm as assmt_manager_hr_nm FROM esg.tb_contractor_assmt_report car LEFT JOIN esg.tb_partner_comp_info tpci ON car.part_comp_id = tpci.part_comp_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_info thi ON car.assmt_manager_hr_id = thi.hr_id WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = #{docType} AND tpci.part_comp_id = #{partCompId} AND car.assmt_dt between #{writeYear} || '0101' AND #{writeYear} || '1231' ORDER BY car.use_yn desc, car.assmt_dt desc
